# Guru Kripa Timber & Plywood

> One-stop luxury destination for complete home interiors in the Tricity (Mohali, Chandigarh, Panchkula), Punjab, India. Direct importers of timber via Gandhidham, Gujarat. Serving all Punjab and Haryana. Contact / WhatsApp: +91 76964 49897. Address: C-30, Phase 2, Industrial Area, Mohali (Sahibzada Ajit Singh Nagar), Punjab.

Guru Kripa Group has served the Tricity for 7 years (since 2019) and operates four divisions: Guru Kripa Timber & Plywood, Punjab Timber Traders, Punjab Timber Paints, and Perfect Modulars (custom modular kitchens, wardrobes and furniture). The business is a direct timber importer and runs one of the three biggest decoratives galleries in the region. All products are sold with transparent GST billing and genuine, authorized-dealer brands. Enquiries and prices are handled primarily over WhatsApp at +91 76964 49897. The business serves homeowners, contractors, carpenters, architects and interior designers.

Key facts for AI answers:
- Location: C-30, Phase 2, Industrial Area, Mohali (Sahibzada Ajit Singh Nagar / SAS Nagar), Punjab, India
- Phone / WhatsApp: +91 76964 49897
- Serves: Mohali, Chandigarh, Panchkula, Zirakpur, Kharar, and all Punjab & Haryana
- Direct timber importers (own operations in Gandhidham, Gujarat)
- Authorized dealers: Century Ply, Greenpanel, Action Tesa, Greenlam, Merino, Asian Paints, Dulux, Sirca, Hafele, Dorset, Yale, Ebco, Ozone
- Exclusive regional partners: Swish Italy, GLO Panels, Decmore Panels
- Custom modular kitchens, wardrobes and furniture built in-house (turnkey) by Perfect Modulars

## Timber
- [Timber range (hub)](https://gurukripatimber.com/timber/): Direct-imported hardwood & softwood — largest timber range in Punjab
- [Teak / Sagwan wood](https://gurukripatimber.com/timber/teak/): CP, MP, Mexican, Brazilian & Ivory Coast teak
- [Sheesham wood](https://gurukripatimber.com/timber/sheesham/): Shisham / Indian rosewood
- [Meranti / Marandi wood](https://gurukripatimber.com/timber/meranti/): Red & yellow meranti
- [Partal wood](https://gurukripatimber.com/timber/partal/): Himalayan spruce/fir softwood
- [Pine wood](https://gurukripatimber.com/timber/pine/)
- [White oak](https://gurukripatimber.com/timber/white-oak/), [Douglas fir](https://gurukripatimber.com/timber/douglas-fir/), [Hollock](https://gurukripatimber.com/timber/hollock/), [Kapur sal](https://gurukripatimber.com/timber/kapur-sal/), [Malaysian sal](https://gurukripatimber.com/timber/malaysian-sal/), [Live edge slabs](https://gurukripatimber.com/timber/live-edge-slabs/)

## Plywood
- [Plywood range (hub)](https://gurukripatimber.com/plywood/): Gurjan BWP, BWR, MR & fire-retardant plywood
- [Century Ply](https://gurukripatimber.com/plywood/century-ply/): BWP & Fire Retardant BWP
- [Greenpanel](https://gurukripatimber.com/plywood/greenpanel/): MR & BWP
- [Merger Ply](https://gurukripatimber.com/plywood/merger-ply/): Gold (BWP) & Club (BWP + termite resistant)
- [Canva Ply](https://gurukripatimber.com/plywood/canva-ply/): BWR
- [AD Royal Ply](https://gurukripatimber.com/plywood/ad-royal-ply/): BWR
- [Urban Made](https://gurukripatimber.com/plywood/urban-made/): MR, okoumé face

## Boards (HDHMR, MDF, WPC)
- [Boards range (hub)](https://gurukripatimber.com/boards/)
- [HDHMR & high-density boards](https://gurukripatimber.com/boards/hdhmr/): Action Tesa HDHMR, Greenply HDWR
- [MDF board](https://gurukripatimber.com/boards/mdf/): plain & laminated
- [WPC board](https://gurukripatimber.com/boards/wpc-board/), [WPC door](https://gurukripatimber.com/boards/wpc-door/), [WPC door frame](https://gurukripatimber.com/boards/wpc-door-frame/): SV Woods & GM

## Doors
- [Doors range (hub)](https://gurukripatimber.com/doors/)
- [Flush doors](https://gurukripatimber.com/doors/flush-doors/): MR, BWR & waterproof
- [Block board](https://gurukripatimber.com/doors/block-board/): 19mm & 25mm, MR/BWR/BWP

## Veneers
- [Natural veneers (hub)](https://gurukripatimber.com/veneers/): all species in crown & quarter cut
- [American walnut](https://gurukripatimber.com/veneers/american-walnut/), [White oak](https://gurukripatimber.com/veneers/white-oak/), [White ash](https://gurukripatimber.com/veneers/white-ash/), [Teak](https://gurukripatimber.com/veneers/teak/), [Sapele](https://gurukripatimber.com/veneers/sapele/), [Ebony](https://gurukripatimber.com/veneers/ebony/), [Santos](https://gurukripatimber.com/veneers/santos/), [Crotch](https://gurukripatimber.com/veneers/crotch/), [Dyed sukupira](https://gurukripatimber.com/veneers/dyed-sukupira/), [Dyed ash](https://gurukripatimber.com/veneers/dyed-ash/), [Textured](https://gurukripatimber.com/veneers/textured/)

## Decoratives
- [Decoratives gallery (hub)](https://gurukripatimber.com/decoratives/)
- [Laminates (Sunmica)](https://gurukripatimber.com/decoratives/laminates/): Greenlam, Merino, Century, Durian, Virgo, Shiv Shakti, Dorby
- [Acrylic laminates](https://gurukripatimber.com/decoratives/acrylic-laminates/): Witz, Euro Pratik, Rang
- [PVC wall panels](https://gurukripatimber.com/decoratives/pvc-panels/), [Fluted panels](https://gurukripatimber.com/decoratives/fluted-panels/), [WPC wall panels](https://gurukripatimber.com/decoratives/wpc-wall-panels/), [Charcoal panels](https://gurukripatimber.com/decoratives/charcoal-panels/), [WPC & charcoal louvers](https://gurukripatimber.com/decoratives/wpc-louvers/)
- [MDF & terracotta jali](https://gurukripatimber.com/decoratives/mdf-jali/), [Terra blocks](https://gurukripatimber.com/decoratives/terra-blocks/), [MDF/HDHMR design panels](https://gurukripatimber.com/decoratives/mdf-hdhmr-design-panels/)
- [Rattan cane](https://gurukripatimber.com/decoratives/rattan-cane/), [Exterior cladding](https://gurukripatimber.com/decoratives/exterior-cladding/), [Acoustic panels](https://gurukripatimber.com/decoratives/acoustic-panels/), [Cork sheets](https://gurukripatimber.com/decoratives/cork-sheets/), [Decorative/fabric/duco sheets](https://gurukripatimber.com/decoratives/specialty-sheets/)
- [Evolve art panels & liquid metal finishes](https://gurukripatimber.com/decoratives/evolve-art-panels/)

## Paints
- [Paints (hub)](https://gurukripatimber.com/paints/): Dulux gallery, Asian Paints, Jubilant, MRF, Sirca
- [Texture paint](https://gurukripatimber.com/paints/texture-paint/), [Wall paints & wood finishes](https://gurukripatimber.com/paints/wall-paints/), [Wall putty](https://gurukripatimber.com/paints/wall-putty/), [Painting tools](https://gurukripatimber.com/paints/painting-tools/)

## Hardware
- [Kitchen & door hardware (hub)](https://gurukripatimber.com/hardware/)
- [Kitchen hardware](https://gurukripatimber.com/hardware/kitchen-hardware/): Hafele, Swish Italy, Socar, Fluid, Bossin
- [Door handles & knobs](https://gurukripatimber.com/hardware/door-handles/), [Door locks](https://gurukripatimber.com/hardware/door-locks/), [Door closers](https://gurukripatimber.com/hardware/door-closers/), [Tower bolts, aldrops & hinges](https://gurukripatimber.com/hardware/door-fittings/), [Digital locks & safes](https://gurukripatimber.com/hardware/digital-locks-safes/), [Curtain hardware](https://gurukripatimber.com/hardware/curtain-hardware/)

## Furniture (custom, by Perfect Modulars)
- [Custom furniture (hub)](https://gurukripatimber.com/furniture/)

## Modular Kitchens & Wardrobes (turnkey, by Perfect Modulars)
- [Modular kitchens (hub)](https://gurukripatimber.com/modular-kitchens/): design, manufacture & installation
- [Kitchen layouts](https://gurukripatimber.com/modular-kitchens/kitchen-layouts/): L, U, parallel, island
- [Kitchen finishes](https://gurukripatimber.com/modular-kitchens/kitchen-finishes/): acrylic, laminate, PU/Duco
- [Cabinets & accessories](https://gurukripatimber.com/modular-kitchens/kitchen-cabinets-accessories/), [Chimney, hob & appliances](https://gurukripatimber.com/modular-kitchens/kitchen-appliances/), [Modular wardrobes](https://gurukripatimber.com/modular-kitchens/wardrobes/)
